notes: Form-binary archetype: track + thumb with off/on dual state pair plus standard interaction states.
Variant pair is filled (solid track) + outlined (border-only off, filled on). No soft/ghost — track must always be visible.
Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral remap via [data-role=...] overriding --brand-* palette vars at the component scope.
aria-invalid='true' forces a visible border even on the filled variant — invalid-state tokens use the canonical -invalid suffix per naming-charter.md §State.
Thumb icon slot is optional (✓/✕ glyph) — sized via --switch-thumb-icon-size, color split off/on.
